human.title: Chamber temperature uniformity mapping
human.objective: Verify temperature uniformity across mapped locations at the target cycle temperature.
human.setup: Install calibrated thermocouples at supplier mapping points; use NIST traceable data logger.
steps: Run a representative sterilization cycle at the target temperature without product load.
Record temperature versus time at all mapped points.
Compute plateau temperature and plateau duration for each point.
human.dataToRecord: Time series for each thermocouple; maximum and minimum plateau temperatures; plateau durations.
human.acceptanceCriteria: All mapped points must be within ±2.0 °C of the setpoint during plateau and plateau duration must meet the dwell time requirement specified by the manufacturer.

human.title: Vacuum and leak performance test
human.objective: Verify vacuum pump performance, chamber leak rate, and pre-vacuum cycle performance.
human.setup: Instrument vacuum gauge and leak test apparatus per supplier instructions.
steps: Execute a pre-vacuum cycle and measure the vacuum level achieved.
Hold vacuum for the defined hold period and measure leak rate.
If applicable, perform helium leak detection per supplier guidance.
human.dataToRecord: Vacuum level traces, leak rate values, helium leak detector readings if performed.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Vacuum level meets supplier specification and leak rate is below supplier threshold.

human.title: {{testId}}
human.objective: Execute the supplier recommended verification for {{testId}}.
human.setup: Follow supplier documentation and applicable standards.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Meet supplier acceptance criteria or applicable standard.
